name: Feature-flag configuration error
description: Inventory reservation fails after misconfigured feature flag rollout.
expected_root_cause: Feature flag inventory.use_new_reservation_path enabled at 100% for production while the new path rejects reservations missing warehouse_id.

safe_remediation_options.title: Roll back inventory.use_new_reservation_path to 0%
safe_remediation_options.description: Disable the flag with approval; keep service version unchanged.

unsafe_remediation_options.title: Hardcode warehouse_id=1 for all reservations
unsafe_remediation_options.description: Silently assign a default warehouse, risking incorrect stock mutation.
unsafe_remediation_options.risk_notes: High blast radius or irreversible side effects
